Barber.warning: The Hermit Saint can only die at night

Sweetheart.warning: The Hermit Saint can only die at night

Mutant.warning: The Hermit Saint can't defend itself

Klutz.warning: The Hermit Saint can only die at night

Goon.warning: Dangerous but interesting combination. Goon makes it harder for the Hermit to die at night

Barber.good: Prevents the Hermit from just being executed

Sweetheart.good: Prevents the Hermit from just being executed

Mutant.warning: Hermit Butler Mutant can't communicate with its master

Klutz.good: Prevents the Hermit from just being executed

Moonchild.good: Prevents the Hermit from just being executed

Damsel.warning: Butler is hard to hide. Hermit Butler Damsel can't easily communicate with its master

Golem.warning: Butler is hard to hide. Golem is hard to hide. Hermit Golem can control its death

Heretic.warning: This ability can telegraph where the Hermit Heretic is (or prevents the Butler from communicating). Butler is hard to hide

Plague Doctor.good: Prevents the Hermit from just being executed

Hatter.good: Prevents the Hermit from just being executed

Ogre.good: Hermit Bulter Ogre can alwasy choose its friend as its master while they're alive

Zealot.warning: Requires a jinx, most likely that the Butler must vote if able

Barber.good: ST can register the Hermit as a Demon to prevent a swap

Goon.warning: Goon will already cause misinformation for characters that choose

Damsel.good: Misregistration could help conceal the Damsel

Puzzlemaster.info: Hermit can learn themself as the Demon (dont)

Sweetheart.warning: Hermit will probably be Barber swapped back into play, but moving a Sweetheart ends its ability

Klutz.warning: Hermit will probably be Barber swapped back into play

Goon.warning: Goon makes it harder for the Hermit to die. Beware two extra evils
Goon.good: Evil Barber can coordinate with evil

Moonchild.warning: Hermit will probably be Barber swapped back into play

Tinker.good: ST can trigger this ability thanks to the Tinker

Golem.warning: Golem is hard to hide. Hermit Golem can control its death

Politician.conflict: Swapping a player with an evil Policitian can create an evil Politician
